apigateway.stage.canarysetting.Deploymen.Docs: The identifier of the deployment that the stage points to.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.PercentTr.Docs: The percentage (0-100) of traffic diverted to a canary deployment.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.StageVari.Docs: Stage variables overridden for a canary release deployment, including new stage variables introduced in the canary. These stage variables are represented as a string-to-string map between stage variable names and their values.  Duplicates are not allowed.

apigateway.stage.canarysetting.UseStageC.Docs: Whether the canary deployment uses the stage cache or not.
